arts.sum: Patrik Schick delivered a stunning performance for Bayer Leverkusen, scoring four goals in their dominant 5-1 victory over Freiburg in the Bundesliga. The Czech striker's remarkable display has not only kept the reigning German champions within striking distance of league leaders Bayern Munich but has also reignited transfer speculation surrounding his future.
